gym_membership_options.name: Starter Pulse
features: Access to main gym floor (5 AM - 11 PM)
Locker room access with towel service
Mobile app access with basic workout tracking

gym_membership_options.name: Pro Elite
features: Unlimited group fitness classes (yoga, HIIT, spin)
Access to premium recovery zone (sauna, cold plunge, massage chairs)
1 complimentary personal training session per month
Access to all gym locations (5 locations)
Locker room with premium amenities (shampoo, razors, hair dryers)

gym_membership_options.name: Black Card
features: 24/7 VIP access with priority lane entry
Unlimited group fitness + signature small-group training
Full recovery suite (cryotherapy, infrared sauna, hydromassage, compression therapy)
Unlimited personal training sessions (2 per week included)
Access to all gym locations nationwide (25+ locations)
Dedicated VIP locker room with private showers and smart lockers
Nutrition coaching and quarterly body composition scans

more_features.guest_privileges: Unlimited guests + 2 permanent family add-ons at 50% off
more_features.exclusive_events: Quarterly member mixers and fitness workshops
